query:
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.onboardingStep, t.onboardingCompleted, u.email, u.name as userName 
FROM tenants t 
JOIN users u ON u.tenantId = t.id 
WHERE u.email LIKE '%coreydenzel%' OR t.name LIKE '%Acme%'
ORDER BY t.id DESC LIMIT 5;
command:
